title: Noxious
description: A mod that add snakes in multiple biomes across all dimensions
body:
The mod adds snakes to:

-forests

-deserts

-jungles

-dripstone caves

-swamps

-savannas

-crimson forests

-end outer islands

![All the snakes from the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed34120e5853fb5063a9219e535bf888ad5bacfc.png)

All snakes drop their respective fangs. When holding a snake fang in the off hand and a food item or potion in your main hand you can add the potion effect from the fang to the item.

![Creating poisoned food](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/374214bc7713a17b3a2407864765f1232c1e5eb8.png)

You can also combine a snake fang with an amethyst shard to create a cured snake fang that applies positive effects.

![Creation of the cured fang](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4eabf43312ffefd12279350f36889d5d653425e.png)
